Package com.irurueta.geometry.io

Class Material3DS

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.geometry.io.Material
      • com.irurueta.geometry.io.Material3DS
  • public class Material3DS
extends Material
    Defines a material in a 3D Studio Max file.
